title: genista racemosa
intro: Genista racemosa, also known as the hairy bird's foot or dyer's greenweed, is a perennial plant species in the Fabaceae family. It has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, offering benefits such as reducing inflammation, boosting the immune system, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Genista racemosa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
